context: Tests whether the agent uses parallel stages for independent quality gates, adds parallelsAlwaysFailFast() in pipeline options, includes cleanWs() in a post always block, and follows Declarative pipeline conventions.

checklist.name: Parallel block used
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile contains a parallel { } block wrapping at least 2 concurrent stages

checklist.name: parallelsAlwaysFailFast in options
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile options block includes parallelsAlwaysFailFast() — NOT just a per-block failFast true inside the parallel stage

checklist.name: cleanWs in post always
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile post block contains always { cleanWs() } or always { deleteDir() }

checklist.name: At least 3 parallel stages
checklist.description: The parallel block contains at least 3 named child stages

checklist.name: Sequential stage after parallel
checklist.description: A build or push stage appears as a separate sequential stage AFTER the parallel block

checklist.name: Declarative syntax
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile uses Declarative syntax starting with 'pipeline {' not Scripted 'node {'

checklist.name: post success artifacts
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile post block includes a success { } condition with archiveArtifacts or notification step

checklist.name: post failure notification
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile post block includes a failure { } condition (e.g., slack, email notification)

checklist.name: No credential params
checklist.description: Jenkinsfile does NOT use parameters block to pass secrets or credentials
